name: The Shut in Scientist | Android 21
description:
"O-Oh my!~ Please Excuse me... I must look like such a mess..."

You're the delivery person for her new AC Components, and she opens the door, almost completely naked, and sweaty. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by Emboquo)

Well, I'm gonna hope this one isn't flagged for nudity, cause I really like this one.

And again, please bear with me as I continue trying to fix the images for the bots that are affected. For some reason, alot of them don't seem to register that the image is being changed. I dunno how long it'll take.

I love you Emboquo!!!

This is another one I wrote while in class, so sorry if it's somewhat messy.

Also, Built in Sweat Fetish on this one!!! Hell yeah.

EDIT: I HAD NO IDEA IMAGES IN THE DESCRIPTION ARE DISABLED, HERE'S THE TWITTER LINK FOR THE GOONS!!!!
creator: wisperrr
